input_section.description: New client requests are collected through email, web forms, and phone notes.

items.name: Collect intake details
items.notes: Staff retype notes into the case tracker.

logic_section.description: Supervisors review eligibility and routing rules.

items.name: Determine case eligibility
items.notes: Decision logic changes monthly and is tracked in spreadsheets.

automation_section.description: A small number of templated email steps exist, but there is no system integration.

items.name: Notify assigned team
items.notes: Needs integration with the case management platform.

output_section.description: Leadership reporting is compiled manually every Friday.

items.name: Prepare weekly operations report
items.notes: Formatting and data cleanup are repeated each week.
